name: QA 1514
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1514

derived metrics additional features checkout

- novalue() for derived metrics

- lazy binding for derived metrics invovling guard ? left-expr : right-expr

- check to stop nested derived metric definitions

- \ continuation @ end of line

- meta= for novalue() and mkconst()



valgrind variant, see qa/1508 for the non-valgrind variant



check-group-include: derive pmrep



Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2004 reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1514

derived metrics additional features checkout

  • novalue() for derived metrics

  • lazy binding for derived metrics invovling guard ? left-expr : right-expr

  • check to stop nested derived metric definitions

  • \ continuation @ end of line

  • meta= for novalue() and mkconst()

valgrind variant, see qa/1508 for the non-valgrind variant

check-group-include: derive pmrep

Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2004 reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1514.out.bad)
474,477c474,486
< Semantic error: derived metric baz: operand foo: Illegal nested derived metric
< Semantic error: derived metric bah: operand bar: Illegal nested derived metric
< Unknown metric baz (PM_ERR_NAME Unknown metric name).
< Unknown metric bah (PM_ERR_NAME Unknown metric name).
---
> Traceback (most recent call last):
>   File "PCP_BIN_DIR/pmrep", line 40, in <module>
>     from pcp import pmapi, pmi, pmconfig
>   File "/usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/pcp/pmi.py", line 126, in <module>
>     LIBPCP_IMPORT.pmiWrite2.restype = c_int
>     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
>   File "/usr/lib/python3.12/ctypes/__init__.py", line 392, in __getattr__
>     func = self.__getitem__(name)
>            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
>   File "/usr/lib/python3.12/ctypes/__init__.py", line 397, in __getitem__
>     func = self._FuncPtr((name_or_ordinal, self))
>            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> AttributeError: /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpcp_import.so.2: undefined symbol: pmiWrite2
Check local PMCD is still alive ...

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 1514

derived metrics additional features checkout

- novalue() for derived metrics

- lazy binding for derived metrics invovling guard ? left-expr : right-expr

- check to stop nested derived metric definitions

- \ continuation @ end of line

- meta= for novalue() and mkconst()



valgrind variant, see qa/1508 for the non-valgrind variant
